productDisplayName: Ganuchi Men Casual Blue Casual Shoes
description: Designed for those who never compromise on comfort and style, these slip-on styled leather shoes from ganuchi are a great buy. Slip into them barefoot and pair them with capris and stylish t-shirts for unparalleled cool.UpperShaded leather upper for absolute style and comfortMock leather lacing through eyelets along the wide collar, with a lacing system on the forefoot to customise the FitNubuck inner lining with synthetic leather at the backfoot inner for breathable, all-day comfortPrinted fabric footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole in herringbone pattern grooves for absolute grip and tractionshoe careUse a branded leather conditioner Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
